attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT COALESCE(MIN(LAST_UPDATE_DATE),CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) as  MACRO_START_EXTRACT_DATE , 
COALESCE(MAX(LAST_UPDATE_DATE),CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) as  MACRO_END_EXTRACT_DATE 
FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.RAO_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_EDW_DTL 
WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME BETWEEN (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE AS LAST_EXTRACT_DATE_AUD_JOB FROM $$CTLDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_AUD_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_DTLS'
AND TABLE_NAME='WI_AUD_SRC_ACCUM_COUNT_SUCCESS')
 AND (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE AS LAST_EXTRACT_DATE_TD FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS  WHERE  JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_ST_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_DTLS' )
